title: MIGHTEE: The dark matter haloes, duty cycle and mechanical feedback from radio-AGN up to $z \sim 2.5$
comment: 24 pages, 9 figures, 3 tables, accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: Radio-AGN are observed to be more strongly clustered than non-active galaxies, though it is unclear whether this is simply due to their preference for massive host galaxies, or if they reside in distinct environments beyond this mass dependence. Using data from three fields covered by the MIGHTEE survey, we measure the angular two-point cross-correlation functions with a large, stellar mass-limited population of near-infrared selected galaxies, overcoming limitations of previous single-deep-field studies. By fitting halo occupation distribution models, we infer the galaxy bias parameters, $b$, for radio-AGN in three redshift ranges with median redshifts of $z_{med}=0.76^{+0.17}_{-0.28}$, $1.25^{+0.14}_{-0.17}$ and $1.75^{+0.44}_{-0.18}$, finding $b=1.94^{+0.07}_{-0.07}$, $2.50^{+0.11}_{-0.18}$ and $3.38^{+0.27}_{-0.38}$, respectively. The typical dark matter halo mass decreases with increasing redshift: $\log_{10}(\langle M_{h} \rangle/{M_\odot})=13.44^{+0.08}_{-0.08}$, $13.17^{+0.07}_{-0.06}$ and $13.03^{+0.09}_{-0.10}$, which we attribute to the increased abundance of cold gas required to fuel AGN activity at earlier times. The AGN duty cycle is determined to be $\sim5-9\%$, and we estimate that the total energy radiated by radio-jets over $0<z<2.5$ is $\sim10^{53}$ J per halo, which is sufficient to account for the observed excess heating of gas beyond that of gravitational collapse. Comparing the typical dark matter halo masses to the values obtained for the control sample, we find that the halo masses of radio-AGN are $1.54^{+0.47}_{-0.33}$, $1.11^{+0.25}_{-0.20}$ and $1.82^{+1.04}_{-0.57}$ times greater than those of the stellar mass- and redshift-matched galaxies. This difference could arise because AGN feedback suppresses stellar mass growth while leaving halo mass unchanged, or because radio-AGN preferentially reside in earlier forming haloes which are more strongly clustered.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 射电活动星系核（radio-AGN）的成团性比非活动星系更强，但目前尚不清楚这仅仅是因为它们倾向于存在于大质量宿主星系中，还是因为它们存在于超越这种质量依赖性的不同环境中。利用MIGHTEE巡天覆盖的三个天区的数据，我们测量了射电活动星系核与一个大型、恒星质量限定的近红外选择星系样本之间的角两点交叉相关函数，克服了以往单一深场研究的局限性。通过拟合暗晕占有分布模型，我们推断出三个红移区间（中值红移分别为$z_{med}=0.76^{+0.17}_{-0.28}$、$1.25^{+0.14}_{-0.17}$和$1.75^{+0.44}_{-0.18}$）内射电活动星系核的星系偏置参数$b$，分别为$b=1.94^{+0.07}_{-0.07}$、$2.50^{+0.11}_{-0.18}$和$3.38^{+0.27}_{-0.38}$。典型的暗物质晕质量随红移增加而减小：$\log_{10}(\langle M_{h} \rangle/{M_\odot})=13.44^{+0.08}_{-0.08}$、$13.17^{+0.07}_{-0.06}$和$13.03^{+0.09}_{-0.10}$，我们将此归因于在更早时期需要更丰富的冷气体来激发活动星系核活动。活动星系核的占空比确定为$\sim5-9\%$，我们估计在$0<z<2.5$范围内射电喷流辐射的总能量约为每个暗晕$\sim10^{53}$焦耳，这足以解释观测到的超出引力塌缩之外的气体额外加热。将典型的暗晕质量与对照样本的值进行比较，我们发现射电活动星系核的暗晕质量分别是恒星质量和红移匹配星系的$1.54^{+0.47}_{-0.33}$、$1.11^{+0.25}_{-0.20}$和$1.82^{+1.04}_{-0.57}$倍。这种差异可能源于活动星系核反馈抑制了恒星质量增长而暗晕质量保持不变，或者射电活动星系核更倾向于存在于早期形成、成团性更强的暗晕中。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，射电活动星系核的暗物质晕质量随红移减小可能源于早期宇宙需要更多冷气体来激发活动星系核活动。射电活动星系核比匹配星系具有更大晕质量，可能是由于活动星系核反馈抑制恒星质量增长而晕质量保持不变，或射电活动星系核更倾向于存在于早期形成、成团性更强的晕中。

title: Untangling dust emission and CIB anisotropies with the Scattering Transform Statistics
summary: Template-fit approach is often used to separate the Galactic dust emission and the cosmic infrared background (CIB) anisotropies at low $\text{HI}$ column density regions with an underlying assumption that the gas and dust are tightly correlated. However, this method fails in regions where additional Galactic emission within the molecular hydrogen, diffuse ionized gas, and dark gas are present. We develop and test a statistical component separation to extract the dust signal from the contaminated $\textit{Planck}$ $353\,\rm GHz$ observations using the Scattering Covariance (SC) statistics. We first obtain a set CIB maps over $25$ square patches, each with a sky area of $222\,{\rm deg}^{2}$, using the linear correlation of dust and Galactic $21\,\rm cm$ $\text{HI}$ emission valid at low $\text{HI}$ column density regions using the template-fit approach. We then construct, from these $25$ maps, a generative model of CIB using the SC statistics. We finally rely on this contamination model to perform a component separation of dust and CIB in the $\textit{Planck}$ data for different sky regions. Applying our algorithm to the $\textit{Planck}$ $353\,\rm GHz$ observations, we recover a dust map for a test sky region that has more structures as compared to the corrected SFD map at $100\,μ\rm m$. The differences seen in the map level can be explained by decomposing the recovered $\textit{Planck}$ dust map into two gas phases: dust associated with $N_{\text{HI}}$ and dust associated with $N_{\text{H}_{2}}$. This work provides a clear pathway to map the Galactic interstellar reddening over intermediate and high Galactic latitudes.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一种基于散射协方差统计的组件分离方法，用于从受污染的Planck 353 GHz观测中提取银河尘埃信号，解决了传统模板拟合方法在存在额外银河发射区域失效的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统模板拟合方法基于气体与尘埃紧密相关的假设，在低HI柱密度区域分离银河尘埃发射和宇宙红外背景各向异性，但在存在分子氢、弥散电离气体和暗气体等额外银河发射的区域会失效。
AI.method: 首先在25个222平方度的天区使用模板拟合方法获得CIB图，然后基于这些图使用散射协方差统计构建CIB生成模型，最后利用该污染模型对不同天区的Planck数据进行尘埃和CIB的组件分离。
AI.result: 应用该算法到Planck 353 GHz观测中，恢复的尘埃图比修正的SFD 100μm图显示出更多结构，通过将恢复的尘埃图分解为与NHI和NH2相关的两个气体相可以解释这些差异。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为在中高银纬区域绘制银河星际红化图提供了清晰的途径，改进了传统模板拟合方法的局限性。

title: The Baryonic Mass-Halo Mass Relation of Extragalactic Systems
comment: Accepted for publication in the Astrophysical Journal. 36 pages, 9 figures
summary: We combine data for extragalactic systems to quantify a relation between the observed baryonic mass $M_b$ and the enclosed dynamical mass $M_{200}$ inferred from kinematics or gravitational lensing. Our sample covers nine orders of magnitude in baryonic mass, including galaxies with kinematic or weak gravitational lensing data and groups and clusters of galaxies with new gravitational lensing data. For rich clusters with $M_b > 10^{14}\;\mathrm{M}_{\odot}$, the observed baryon fraction is consistent with the cosmic value, $f_b = 0.157$. For lower masses, the baryon fraction decreases systematically with mass. The variation is well described by $M_b/M_{200} = f_b \tanh(M_b/M_0)^{1/4}$ with $M_0 \approx 5 \times 10^{13}\;\mathrm{M}_{\odot}$. This relation is qualitatively similar to stellar mass-halo mass relations derived from abundance matching, but exhibits less scatter.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过结合星系、星系群和星系团的观测数据，发现了重子质量与暗晕质量之间的系统关系：在高质量端（星系团）重子分数接近宇宙平均值，而在低质量端重子分数随质量减小而降低。
AI.motivation: 研究星系、星系群和星系团中重子物质与暗物质的比例关系，探索从星系到星系团尺度上重子物质分布的规律性，理解重子物质在不同质量尺度上的分布特征。
AI.method: 结合多种观测数据：星系运动学数据、弱引力透镜数据以及新的星系团引力透镜数据，覆盖9个数量级的重子质量范围，量化重子质量与动力学质量之间的关系。
AI.result: 发现重子分数随系统质量变化的规律：富星系团的重子分数与宇宙平均值一致（fb=0.157），低质量系统的重子分数随质量减小而系统性降低，可用Mb/M200 = fb tanh(Mb/M0)^(1/4)描述，其中M0≈5×10^13 M⊙。
AI.conclusion: 从星系到星系团尺度存在统一的重子质量-暗晕质量关系，该关系比丰度匹配方法得到的恒星质量-晕质量关系具有更小的弥散，为理解宇宙中重子物质的分布提供了重要约束。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为星系、星系群和星系团的重子质量-暗晕质量关系，虽然涉及引力透镜（弱透镜和强透镜）作为测量方法，但核心科学问题是重子物质分布与暗晕质量的关系，属于星系形成与宇宙学大尺度结构范畴。用户主要兴趣是强引力透镜，特别是星系-星系强透镜、高红移星系动力学和多相气体等，与本文的宏观重子分数关系重叠有限。论文未涉及高红移星系动力学、多相气体或用户核心作者。因此相关性一般。
recommendation.topic_fit: 一般。论文涉及引力透镜方法，但主题是重子-暗晕质量关系，与用户强透镜、高红移星系动力学等核心兴趣方向不完全一致。
recommendation.method_fit: 一般。论文使用引力透镜（弱透镜和强透镜）作为测量动力学质量的手段，但方法本身并非用户关注的高红移星系动力学或强透镜建模。
recommendation.author_fit: 低。论文作者（Stacy McGaugh等）不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等。论文提出了一个覆盖9个数量级的统一重子质量-暗晕质量关系，具有一定新颖性，但与用户兴趣方向关联度不高。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题偏向星系-暗晕关系和大尺度结构，与用户强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学等核心兴趣方向匹配度较低。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们结合河外系统的数据，量化了观测到的重子质量 $M_b$ 与通过运动学或引力透镜推断的封闭动力学质量 $M_{200}$ 之间的关系。我们的样本覆盖了重子质量九个数量级，包括具有运动学或弱引力透镜数据的星系，以及具有新引力透镜数据的星系群和星系团。对于 $M_b > 10^{14}\;\mathrm{M}_{\odot}$ 的富星系团，观测到的重子分数与宇宙学值 $f_b = 0.157$ 一致。对于较低质量，重子分数随质量系统性降低。这种变化可以用 $M_b/M_{200} = f_b \tanh(M_b/M_0)^{1/4}$ 很好地描述，其中 $M_0 \approx 5 \times 10^{13}\;\mathrm{M}_{\odot}$。该关系在定性上与通过丰度匹配得到的恒星质量-暗晕质量关系相似，但表现出更小的弥散。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，从星系到星系团尺度存在统一的重子质量-暗晕质量关系，该关系比丰度匹配方法得到的恒星质量-晕质量关系具有更小的弥散，为理解宇宙中重子物质的分布提供了重要约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Conceptual elements of a galaxy: the stars (yellow/blue) and atomic gas (green) of NGC 6946 (Spitzer \(3.6\mu\) and 21 cm data: Walter et al. , 2008 ) are shown embedded in an extended dark matter halo (black). The dark matter density decreases continuously with radius so the halo has no hard edge, but for convenience we adopt the common convention that the radius \(r_{200}\) marks the boundary of the dark matter halo and the dividing line between the CGM and IGM (orange). The stars and gas illustrated here appear within \(r<20\;{kpc}\) while \(r_{200}\approx 220\;{kpc}\) (not shown to scale).

title: Consistent Gas-Phase Temperatures and Metallicities from UV and Optical Nebular Emission: A Reliable Foundation from z=0 to Cosmic Dawn
comment: 15 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables, submitted for publication in PASA
summary: The rest-frame UV spectra of star-forming galaxies are increasingly important as they become one of the primary windows to probe the physical properties of cosmic dawn (z>8) galaxies with the James Webb Space Telescope. However, the systematic discrepancies between UV and optical gas-phase metallicity measurements remain poorly understood in the local universe, partly due to challenges in achieving precise comparisons between UV and optical spectra for the same objects. In this work, we introduce a novel method that leverages the HeII 1640 and HeII 4686 nebular emission lines to achieve accurate aperture and reddening corrections between UV and optical spectra. Here we apply this method to three nearby Blue Compact Dwarf (BCD) galaxies. Our results demonstrate that this approach enables precise measurements, with electron temperatures ($T_e$) derived from UV and optical spectra exhibiting closer agreement compared to previous studies, and O/H abundance agreeing within 0.1 dex. However, two BCDs appear to have lower UV-based electron temperatures $T_{e~1666} < T_{e~4363}$, in contrast to expectations from the temperature fluctuation model. We consider a variety of possible explanations for these unphysical temperatures - differential dust attenuation, aperture differences, and spatial extent of emission lines - but no suitable cause is identified. These findings suggest a complex gaseous environment associated with star formation, and underscore the need for additional observations to further investigate the nature of HeII nebular emission and address the systematic issues between UV and optical nebular properties. Nonetheless, the close empirical agreement of these results indicates that UV- and optical-based nebular temperature and abundance measurements can be reliably compared within 0.1 dex, providing a solid foundation for evolutionary studies from the local Universe to cosmic dawn.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用HeII 1640和HeII 4686发射线实现紫外与光学光谱精确孔径和消光校正的新方法，应用于三个邻近的蓝致密矮星系，发现紫外和光学测量结果在0.1 dex内一致，但部分星系出现与温度涨落模型预期不符的异常温度关系。
AI.motivation: 随着詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜观测高红移(z>8)宇宙黎明星系，紫外光谱的重要性日益增加。然而，在本地宇宙中，紫外和光学气体相金属丰度测量之间的系统性差异仍未得到充分理解，部分原因是难以对同一目标实现紫外和光学光谱的精确比较。
AI.method: 提出了一种新颖方法，利用HeII 1640和HeII 4686星云发射线实现紫外和光学光谱之间的精确孔径和消光校正。该方法应用于三个邻近的蓝致密矮星系，通过比较紫外和光学光谱推导的电子温度(T_e)和O/H丰度来验证方法的有效性。
AI.result: 该方法实现了精确测量，紫外和光学光谱推导的电子温度(T_e)比先前研究更接近，O/H丰度在0.1 dex内一致。然而，两个蓝致密矮星系显示出紫外电子温度低于光学电子温度的反常现象，与温度涨落模型预期相反。尽管考虑了多种可能解释，但未找到合适原因。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现表明与恒星形成相关的复杂气体环境，强调需要更多观测来进一步研究HeII星云发射的性质并解决紫外和光学星云特性之间的系统性问题。尽管如此，结果的密切经验一致性表明，紫外和光学星云温度及丰度测量可以在0.1 dex内可靠比较，为从本地宇宙到宇宙黎明的演化研究提供了坚实基础。

recommendation.reason: 该论文主要关注紫外与光学星云发射线的校准方法，应用于蓝致密矮星系，虽然涉及恒星形成星系和尘埃，但与用户核心兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体）的直接关联较弱。论文未使用引力透镜方法，也未涉及用户核心作者或高红移星系动力学/偏振等优先主题。

recommendation.method_fit: 低度匹配。论文方法基于HeII发射线进行孔径和消光校正，未涉及引力透镜、高分辨率动力学或ALMA/JWST成像等用户常用方法。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 恒星形成星系的静止系紫外光谱日益重要，因为它们成为詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜探测宇宙黎明（z>8）星系物理性质的主要窗口之一。然而，紫外和光学气体相位金属丰度测量之间的系统性差异在本地宇宙中仍未被充分理解，部分原因在于难以对同一目标实现紫外和光学光谱的精确比较。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新方法，利用HeII 1640和HeII 4686星云发射线来实现紫外和光学光谱之间的精确孔径和红化校正。我们将此方法应用于三个邻近的蓝致密矮星系。我们的结果表明，这种方法能够实现精确测量，与先前研究相比，从紫外和光学光谱导出的电子温度（$T_e$）表现出更接近的一致性，且O/H丰度在0.1 dex内一致。然而，两个蓝致密矮星系的紫外电子温度$T_{e~1666} < T_{e~4363}$，这与温度涨落模型的预期相反。我们考虑了多种可能的解释——差异尘埃消光、孔径差异以及发射线的空间延展——但未找到合适的原因。这些发现表明与恒星形成相关的复杂气体环境，并强调需要更多观测来进一步研究HeII星云发射的性质并解决紫外和光学星云特性之间的系统性问题。尽管如此，这些结果的密切经验一致性表明，紫外和光学星云温度及丰度测量可以在0.1 dex内可靠比较，为从本地宇宙到宇宙黎明的演化研究提供了坚实基础。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，这些发现表明与恒星形成相关的复杂气体环境，强调需要更多观测来进一步研究HeII星云发射的性质并解决紫外和光学星云特性之间的系统性问题。尽管如此，结果的密切经验一致性表明，紫外和光学星云温度及丰度测量可以在0.1 dex内可靠比较，为从本地宇宙到宇宙黎明的演化研究提供了坚实基础。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Images of the three blue compact dwarf galaxies studied in this work. Each panel shows a SDSS u, g, r false-color image, the HST/ COS 2 ′′ 5 aperture (circles), and the Keck/ ESI 1 ′′ \(\times\) 20 ′′ slit (rectangles). The 2 ′′ 5 COS aperture size corresponds to projected diameters of 0.23 kpc for SB 2, 0.92 kpc for SB 82, and 2.31 kpc for SB 182 ( Senchyna2017 ) . Near-UV target acquisition images from COS for all three objects can be found in Senchyna2017 . All three objects are dwarf galaxies containing one primary H ii region, from which the majority of nebular line emission is captured by both the COS and ESI apertures.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：本研究中三个蓝致密矮星系的图像。每个面板显示SDSS u、g、r假彩色图像、HST/COS 2 ′′ 5孔径（圆圈）和Keck/ESI 1 ′′ \(\times\) 20 ′′ 狭缝（矩形）。2 ′′ 5 COS孔径大小对应于SB 2的投影直径0.23 kpc、SB 82的0.92 kpc和SB 182的2.31 kpc（Senchyna2017）。所有三个目标的COS近紫外目标获取图像可在Senchyna2017中找到。所有三个目标都是包含一个主要H ii区域的矮星系，COS和ESI孔径均捕获了该区域的大部分星云发射线。

All relevant features are clearly detected, including nebular He ii \(\lambda 4686\) . A broad He ii component is visible in SB 82.

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Rest-frame Keck/ESI spectra with the best-fit Gaussian profile and residual for select emission lines used in this analysis for each target. The x-axis range is 10 Å for all spectra presented in this figure and the y-axis is at a scale of \(10^{-17}\) erg s -1 cm -2 Å -1 . We adopt a double Gaussian profile for He ii \(\lambda 4686\) in SB 82, representing both the broad stellar and narrow nebular components. The broad component spans \(\gtrsim~100\) Å so it is not shown at the scale of this figure, but can be seen in Figure 2 . All other lines are adequately fit with a single narrow component.

title: Galaxy UV Legacy Project: Survey Description and First Insights Into NGC 4449 Recent History of Star Formation
comment: 33 pages, 18 figures, Accepted for publication on ApJ
summary: The Galaxy UV Legacy Project (GULP) is a Cycle 28 Treasury program with the Hubble Space Telescope (HST) designed to characterize resolved massive stars, OB associations, and young star clusters (YSCs) in 26 nearby star-forming galaxies. Utilizing the ACS/SBC F150LP and WFC3/UVIS F218W filters, combined with extensive archival observations, GULP provides an unprecedented panchromatic 8-band view from the Far-UV to the I-band. The target galaxies were carefully selected to span a broad range of metallicities, masses, morphological types, and star formation rates, thereby enabling detailed studies of star formation processes across different galactic environments. This paper introduces the GULP survey, detailing its observational strategy, data processing, and initial scientific results for the irregular barred starburst dwarf galaxy NGC 4449, used as a test case. We derived the physical parameters and ages for thousands of stars using the Binary Populations And Spectral Synthesis (BPASS) models, and found that the younger stars and clusters are predominantly concentrated along the galaxy's central bar, and that over the past <50 Myr star formation progressively migrated from northeast to southwest. We used the F150LP, F218W, and F275W filters to investigate how the UV-bump at lambda 2175 A correlates with the intensity of the UV radiation. The UV-bump is detected in many areas of the galaxy, but is absent in the regions of most intense and recent star formation. This strongly supports the scenario where UV radiation from young, massive stars effectively destroys the small dust grains responsible for the UV-bump.

AI.tldr: GULP项目利用哈勃望远镜对26个邻近星系进行多波段观测，研究大质量恒星、OB星协和年轻星团，并以NGC 4449为例展示了初步科学成果。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系紫外遗产项目（GULP）是哈勃太空望远镜（HST）第28周期的一项国库计划，旨在表征26个邻近恒星形成星系中已解析的大质量恒星、OB星协和年轻星团（YSCs）。利用ACS/SBC F150LP和WFC3/UVIS F218W滤光片，并结合大量档案观测数据，GULP提供了从远紫外到I波段前所未有的全色8波段视图。目标星系经过精心挑选，涵盖了广泛的金属丰度、质量、形态类型和恒星形成率，从而能够详细研究不同星系环境中的恒星形成过程。本文介绍了GULP巡天，详细说明了其观测策略、数据处理以及针对不规则棒状星暴矮星系NGC 4449的初步科学结果（作为测试案例）。我们利用双星种群与光谱合成（BPASS）模型推导了数千颗恒星的物理参数和年龄，发现较年轻的恒星和星团主要沿星系中央棒聚集，并且在过去<50 Myr内，恒星形成从东北向西南逐渐迁移。我们使用F150LP、F218W和F275W滤光片研究了波长2175 Å处的紫外隆起与紫外辐射强度之间的相关性。紫外隆起在星系的许多区域被探测到，但在最强烈和最近的恒星形成区域却不存在。这有力地支持了年轻大质量恒星的紫外辐射有效摧毁了产生紫外隆起的小尘埃颗粒这一情景。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，GULP项目为研究不同星系环境下的恒星形成提供了前所未有的多波段数据，初步结果表明紫外辐射对尘埃颗粒的破坏机制，为理解恒星形成与星际介质相互作用提供了重要见解。
